notes: 4f starter. 4-hit light confirm, where 2LP can potentially chain into itself three times before linking into 5LK depending on the A.K.I.'s distance from the opponent.
5f starter. Target combo into a knockdown.
5f low starter into a knockdown.
Counter-hit light starter. 5MP can hit at ranges where another 2LP could have whiffed.
Decent range starter, though 5MP can easily whiff at further ranges.
Frame traps for each of the hits, and combos on hit. Good tool for making opponents respect A.K.I.'s 5MP. The fireball follow-up leaves A.K.I. -16 on block, so be careful when using it.
5MP: 6f starter with an okay range. 2MP: 8f starter with a better range. Drive gauge used to extend combo into a knockdown.
Routing into OD Serpent Lash and Toxic Blossom. Only works from 2MP or 5HK. 236HP! extensions can be found here.
6f counter-hit starter into a knockdown. Plenty of time to hit confirm.
5MP: another 6f counter-hit starter. Less time to hit confirm and is less safe. Best used as a sure punish after a blockstring.
Whiff punish into a H lash knockdown. Connects well at further ranges.
Convert whiff punish with 5MK into a knockdown.
A.K.I.'s BnB.
Similar to her 5MP route above.
Far range counter-hit combo. Only 236LP works at far ranges.
Drive rush 5MK into BnB.
5MK: 7f low starter that has a decent range. 2MK: 5f low starter with a slightly worse range. 5MP will whiff at further ranges.
24f overhead option. Decent mix option.
A bit slow, but a good approach option. Very plus on block, and plenty of time to confirm.
Counter-hit route, leads to more damage and corner carry.
Her go-to option, as it opens her up to the same setups after a regular 236HP (e.g. safe jumps).
Meterless option for when her drive gauge is low. It builds enough space to safely throw out a projectile. Doesn't work at max range 236HP!
For a mix of extra damage and corner carry at the cost of stricter spacing (doesn't work at max range 236HP!)
Better damage and better corner carry, but loses access to her usual 236HP setup.
For expensive corner carry (only works at max range 236HP!)
Corner carry route. Can end with super to squeez out some extra damage. Good option for closing out rounds.
